title: Bolzano-Weierstrass Property in Metric Spaces
description: A flowchart illustrating the relationship between sequences, limit points, and the Bolzano-Weierstrass property in metric spaces.
elements: Infinite Set S in Metric Space (X,d)
relationships: An infinite set S in (X,d) contains a sequence (x_n) of distinct points
If S has the Bolzano-Weierstrass property, then (x_n) has a limit point p in X
The existence of a limit point p implies there is a subsequence (x_{n_k}) that converges to p
